basic_details.organization_name: Andaman & Nicobar Coastal Zone Management Authority (ANCZMA)
basic_details.short_information: Andaman & Nicobar Coastal Zone Management Authority (ANCZMA) Consultant Notification 2026 has been released on the official website https://forest.and.nic.in. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the ANCZMA Consultant Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor Degree in Forestry, Environmental Science, Marine Biology, Ocean Studies or equivalent from a recognized University
qualification.details: Bachelor Degree in Forestry, Environmental Science, Marine Biology, Ocean Studies or equivalent from a recognized University. Relevant work experience in environmental studies, impact assessments, ecology, marine biology, risk analysis or environmental management. Working knowledge of MS Office etc.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://forest.and.nic.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 29-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

rows.andaman_nicobar_coastal_zone_management_: Bachelor Degree in Forestry, Environmental Science, Marine Biology, Ocean Studies or equivalent from a recognized University

content_sections.heading: ANCZMA Consultant Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the ANCZMA Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download ANCZMA Consultant Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: ANCZMA Consultant Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Bachelor Degree in Forestry, Environmental Science, Marine Biology, Ocean Studies or equivalent from a recognized University. Relevant work experience in environmental studies, impact assessments, ecology, marine biology, risk analysis or environmental management. Working knowledge of MS Office etc.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: https://forest.and.nic.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 29-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ANCZMA Consultant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of applications for the ANCZMA Consultant recruitment is 29th July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Consultant post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the Consultant position by the Andaman & Nicobar Coastal Zone Management Authority (ANCZMA) in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Consultant role?
faq.answer: To be eligible for the Consultant post, candidates must possess a Bachelor's Degree in Forestry, Environmental Science, Marine Biology, Ocean Studies, or an equivalent qualification from a recognized university.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Consultant position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Consultant post is 50 years. There is no minimum age limit specified in the provided data.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Consultant post?
faq.answer: Selected candidates for the Consultant position will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 40,000 per month. This is a contractual role.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the ANCZMA Consultant recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the ANCZMA Consultant recruitment involves a weightage-based evaluation system, which accounts for 100 marks, followed by an interview of the shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the ANCZMA Consultant recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee required for any category of candidates (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the ANCZMA Consultant recruitment. The application is free of cost.

faq.question: Q8. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for the ANCZMA Consultant recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and submit it via post or as instructed in the official notification.

faq.question: Q9. What type of job is this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is for a contractual job. The selected candidates will be appointed on a contract basis for the Consultant position.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of the Andaman & Nicobar Coastal Zone Management Authority, which is https://forest.and.nic.in. Links are also provided in the 'Important Links' section.
